activities_projects.title: Vegetation and Climate Analysis Project
activities_projects.objective: Analyze the relationship between climate and vegetation
steps: Select two regions in India with different climates
Identify the vegetation found in each region
Explain how rainfall and temperature influence vegetation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students analyze climatic influence on vegetation

activities_projects.title: Case Study on Mangrove Forests
activities_projects.objective: Understand the ecological importance of mangrove forests
steps: Research mangrove forests in India
Describe their location and characteristics
Explain their importance in protecting coastal areas

activities_projects.title: Biodiversity Conservation Report
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate the importance of biodiversity conservation
steps: Write a short report on biodiversity in India
Explain threats to biodiversity
Suggest measures to conserve biodiversity
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and depth of report (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Endangered Species Research
steps: Select three endangered species
Describe their habitat and threats
Suggest conservation measures
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop research skills about wildlife protection

activities_projects.title: Forest Ecosystem Diagram
activities_projects.objective: Understand the structure of forest ecosystems
steps: Draw a diagram showing layers of a forest ecosystem
Label trees, shrubs and ground vegetation
Explain the role of each layer
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of diagram and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: National Parks Study
steps: List five national parks in India
Write the major animals found in each park
Explain the role of national parks in conservation
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand protected areas for wildlife

activities_projects.title: Human–Wildlife Conflict Study
activities_projects.objective: Analyze conflicts between humans and wildlife
steps: Identify causes of human–wildlife conflict
Give two real examples
Suggest ways to reduce such conflicts

activities_projects.title: Forest Conservation Awareness Campaign
steps: Prepare awareness materials about forest conservation
Create slogans and messages
Present them to classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop awareness and communication skills

activities_projects.title: Migration of Birds Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the phenomenon of bird migration
steps: Research migratory birds visiting India
Explain why birds migrate
Identify two places in India where migratory birds arrive

activities_projects.title: Environmental Protection Essay
activities_projects.objective: Develop critical thinking about environmental protection
steps: Write an essay on the importance of protecting forests and wildlife
Explain the role of humans in conservation
Suggest sustainable practices
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop critical thinking about sustainability
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of ideas and clarity (10 marks)
